I'll start by discovering the actual schemas for Sentry issues, Linear issues, and GitHub PRs, since I need to know what columns are available to filter on titles.

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT table_name, column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name IN ('sentry_issues','linear_issues','github_pull_requests') ORDER BY table_name, ordinal_position;"}

text: Good — the `title` column exists on both Sentry and Linear, and on `github_pull_requests`. Let me also check the valid values for Sentry status (the description hint says `unresolved | resolved | ignored`) and run all three counts in one co…(+13)
